## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing collaboration between Metronome and GrowthX to support Metronome's upcoming monetization-focused relaunch and market positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Metronome is relaunching positioning around "monetization" to own this market, with a white paper, summit, and Reinvent presence upcoming](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-augmented content creation and distribution services, with a 60-day initial strategy/calibration period followed by ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Key priorities for Metronome include saturating the market with their monetization narrative and building out supporting content quickly](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [GrowthX can potentially accelerate timelines to align with Metronome's launch, and will send proposal details soon](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)

## Topics

### Metronome's Upcoming Relaunch and Priorities

  - [Relaunching positioning/messaging/branding around "monetization" concept](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Goal: Create, define, and own market for end-to-end monetization (pricing, billing, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [White paper launching soon, followed by in-person summit in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Large presence planned for Reinvent conference](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Key challenge: Saturating market with monetization narrative quickly](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Need to build out supporting content and capture interest/traffic](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

### Target Audience and Personas

  - [No single clear owner for monetization currently - spans product, engineering, finance, GTM](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Chief Value Officer role emerging to own monetization](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Current inbound mostly from product/engineering, but CFOs increasingly involved](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Need to support multiple personas (product, finance, GTM) with tailored messaging](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Common use case: Traditional software vendors adding AI offerings, disrupting existing pricing/billing](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### GrowthX's Content Services Overview

  - [AI-augmented content creation and distribution services](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Initial 60-day strategy/calibration period, then ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Services include content planning, creation, SEO optimization, distribution](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Can leverage existing content, speeches, social posts as source material](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Fact-checking and brand voice consistency built into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Optional add-ons like podcast repurposing, newsletters, case studies](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)

### Potential Custom Project for Metronome

  - [Creating pricing model index/teardown for top 100 AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)
  - [GrowthX has relevant experience with similar custom projects (e.g. Bolt)](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [Can scope out as part of initial engagement without additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2614.0)
  - [GrowthX has APIs and workflows to programmatically gather pricing info](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send proposal details and pricing structure by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
  - [Chris to potentially attend GrowthX event next week near Metronome office](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2535.0)
  - [Explore ways to accelerate initial 60-day period to align with Metronome's launch timeline](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2378.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide sample language/materials early tomorrow to kickstart process](https://fathom.video/share/4sY66jaux5v2wE91ZFJshDZ9myGNRw7m?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
